state.next-action: Priority remains phase `11`: ship employee quote and lead-notification email through Payload jobs plus Resend first (`11-01`), then define the shared tool surface for both the in-app copilot and the future OpenClaw field-agent plugin (`11-02`). CLI polish task `09-06` is now closed: `grimetime seed` gained `plan`, `report`, `--only`, and `--no-input`, and local dev now forces MCP off unless explicitly re-enabled.
